source_anchor: source-page 8, Table III; Sec. V evaluation
rationale: Lightening-Transformer scales ADC/DAC power by bit-width and frequency; 8-bit ADC is the normalized baseline conversion.

source_anchor: Sec. II-C observations; Sec. IV-A setup; ADC survey scaling
rationale: SUDS uses a Walden-style bit-depth scaling model: 4-bit ADC energy is 1/16 of the 8-bit baseline before sensitivity factors.

source_anchor: source-page 8, Table III; analog temporal accumulation discussion
rationale: High-resolution conversion is treated as the baseline conversion-latency slot.

source_anchor: Fig. 5 and Sec. IV-B discussion of low-resolution ADC latency/area
rationale: Low-resolution conversion is modeled as a shorter/parallelizable slot; sensitivity allows no latency advantage.

source_anchor: Sec. III/IV DPTC encoding-cost discussion; Fig. 8 power breakdown
rationale: Operand encoding is kept as a large non-ADC term because DAC/MZM modulation is repeatedly identified as a dominant bottleneck.

source_anchor: Sec. 3.4 PD/BPD/PCA transduction; Sec. 4.4 component energy
rationale: Receive frontend remains in the total-energy denominator even when ADC tiering changes.

source_anchor: Sec. 4.3 simulator assumptions; comb laser >-3 dBm, 25 wavelengths, 0.5 W wall-plug
rationale: Laser cost is modeled separately from ADC energy and is stress-scaled by crosstalk/link-budget penalties.

source_anchor: Sec. 2.3 crosstalk limit; Sec. 4.3 comb-laser assumptions
rationale: ASTRA cites 18 wavelength support at 8-bit precision under crosstalk constraints and uses 25 usable comb wavelengths.

source_anchor: Sec. 3.2.1 power/noise model; Fig. 4 crosstalk; Fig. 9 thermal variation
rationale: Crosstalk is represented as a laser/link-budget penalty rather than an accuracy guarantee.
Control overhead is not measured yet; P0.4 sweeps 0-10% and leaves exact accounting to P1.1.

source_anchor: Sec. IV-A/IV-B; MAESTRO, DRAMSim2, CACTI, DSENT, Synopsys methodology
rationale: Total-system claims require broader memory/interconnect models; this appendix only calibrates conversion/peripheral slices.
